concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 使用指数回归拟合家庭收入分布，得到 y = 114604e^{-2E-5x}，用于估算各税级家庭比例。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We assumed the mean income of households making over $357,700 was $500,000. Then, we calculated the exponential regression line for the graph, y =114604e−2E−5x, which modeled the information with quite accurately (r2=0.9874).

concepts_used.title: 线性回归与最小二乘
concepts_used.how_used: 基于过去50年GDP平均增长率2.70%预测未来GDP，用于计算债务/GDP比率。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Over the last 50 years, GDP has increased at an average annual rate of 2.70%; the last three full years (i.e. 2005-7) verified this trend with GDP growth of 3.2%, 2.9%, and 2.2%, respectively. Consequently, we input 2.70% into our representations.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过计算各变量对债务的相对灵敏度，分析模型稳健性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We also analyzed the robustness of the model by finding the relative sensitivities of each variable.

concepts_used.title: 加权求和评价
concepts_used.how_used: 使用简单多属性评分技术（SMART）对三种政策方案进行加权评分，以确定最优方案。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In addition, our proposal scored the highest, using the simple multi-attribute rating technique (SMART).

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 明确列出模型假设，如政策立即实施、税率不变、无重大危机等，并讨论假设的合理性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Several key assumptions were made to create a viable model for federal debt. We assumed each plan would be enacted immediately and completely by Congress. Moreover, we decided the tax rates for each bracket would remain constant for each year between 2009 and 2017...

concepts_used.title: 模型对比的可视化
concepts_used.how_used: 通过债务人均值、债务/GDP比率和SMART评分三种方式对比不同政策方案的结果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We analyzed the models through three methods: one simplifies all the numbers and equations to a single, clear-cut answer: national debt per capita (Ψ_M/H), another puts the debt in context: national debt over GDP (Ψ_C/H), and the third utilizes methodology which could be adjusted to fit each person’s political preferences.

concepts_used.title: Excel 数据透视
concepts_used.how_used: 使用Excel或类似工具处理历史数据，计算平均增长率并用于预测。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We found data from the previous four years for all our federal income and expenditure variables... Based on these data, we modeled the current U.S. government policies through 2017.
